raw_transcript: It's the third time this year, Doctor! I finished the antibiotics for my dental implant three weeks ago, and within five days, the watery stools, that horrible smell, and the cramping were all back. I'm so weak I can't even stand up.
final_corrected_note: It's the third time this year, Doctor! I finished the antibiotics for my dental implant three weeks ago, and within five days, the watery stools, that horrible smell, and the cramping were all back. I'm so weak I can't even stand up.
